message:
feat(ratelimit): Add pool_name field to rate limit configuration

Extend the RateLimitConfig struct to support named rate limit pools:

- Add pool_name: Option<String> field to RateLimitConfig
- Update all test fixtures to include pool_name parameter
- Enables grouping related operations under shared rate limits

This change prepares the rate limiting system for pool-based quota
management where multiple operations can share a common token bucket
identified by pool name rather than individual operation scopes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
